breakdown: This PR fixes XP synthesis and level-up regressions by removing a duplicate `_extract_xp_from_player_data` function and consolidating to use the shared `extract_character_xp` helper. It improves XP extraction logic to check combat_summary's xp_awarded field first before falling back to rewards_pending. The changes are straightforward bug fixes with adequate naming and tests, but introduce minimal new error handling beyond isinstance checks.
key_changes: Replace with shared extract_character_xp helper in multiple locations
Add xp_awarded extraction from combat_summary before falling back to rewards_pending
Add isinstance checks for combat_summary and encounter_summary dictionaries
